items.caption: A slide with a title "arbitration procedure" in bold red letters at the top. below the title, there is a list of bullet points detailing the steps involved in an arbitration process. the text is in a blue font against a white background. the slide also features a logo in the top right corner, which appears to be a stylized representation of a gear or cogwheel with the word "fairness" written above it. the logo is accompanied by the text "fairness in arbitration." the overall style of the image is informational and educational, likely intended for a presentation or educational material.
